creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Weel, I think I've done a bug too quickly. After investigation I've found, that nagios logos (installed with nagios) have more files that nagios-logos-base (I'm attaching diff of files).

So I think that my first suggestion has no sense :-)))

Maybe this port is not needed any more? I have no idea when base logos are installed without nagios...
